PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahfuzcmt/pingpath/main/scripts/deploy_vps.sh" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\) bytes — public, reachable" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/mahfuzcmt/pingpath" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("private={0} default_branch={1} pushed_at={2}" -f $j.private, $j.default_branch, $j.pushed_at\) } catch { Write-Output \("status=" + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) })

Bash(sshpass -p '8IUewxU3PaH26Ro8o9Vc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@103.187.22.131 '
if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo ""Installing Docker...""
  install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
  curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
  chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg
  echo ""deb [arch=$\(dpkg --print-architecture\) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $\(. /etc/os-release && echo $VERSION_CODENAME\) stable"" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -yqq docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin
  systemctl enable --now docker
  echo ""Docker installed successfully""
else
  echo ""Docker already installed""
fi
docker --version
docker compose version
')

Bash(sshpass -p '8IUewxU3PaH26Ro8o9Vc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@103.187.22.131 '
echo ""Configuring firewall...""
ufw --force reset >/dev/null 2>&1
ufw default deny incoming
ufw default allow outgoing
ufw allow 22/tcp comment ""ssh""
ufw allow 80/tcp comment ""http""
ufw allow 443/tcp comment ""https""
ufw allow 8080/tcp comment ""backend""
ufw allow 3000/tcp comment ""frontend""
ufw allow 5023/tcp comment ""gt06 tcp""
ufw --force enable
echo ""Firewall configured""
ufw status
')

Bash(sshpass -p '8IUewxU3PaH26Ro8o9Vc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@103.187.22.131 '
REPO_DIR=""/opt/pingpath""
REPO_URL=""https://github.com/mahfuzcmt/pingpath.git""

if [[ ! -d ""$REPO_DIR/.git"" ]]; then
  echo ""Cloning repository...""
  mkdir -p ""$\(dirname ""$REPO_DIR""\)""
  git clone ""$REPO_URL"" ""$REPO_DIR""
  echo ""Repository cloned to $REPO_DIR""
else
  echo ""Updating existing checkout...""
  cd ""$REPO_DIR""
  git fetch --all --prune
  git reset --hard origin/main
  echo ""Repository updated""
fi
ls -la ""$REPO_DIR""
')

Bash(sshpass -p '8IUewxU3PaH26Ro8o9Vc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password root@103.187.22.131 '
# Update admin password in database \(using bcrypt hash\)
# First generate bcrypt hash for Admin@2026
docker exec pingpath-backend java -cp app.jar -Dloader.main=org.springframework.security.crypto.bcrypt.BCryptPasswordEncoder org.springframework.boot.loader.launch.PropertiesLauncher Admin@2026 2>/dev/null || true

# Direct update using psql with pre-computed bcrypt hash
# BCrypt hash for ""Admin@2026"" with strength 12
docker exec pingpath-postgres psql -U pingpath -d pingpath -c ""
UPDATE users 
SET password_hash = '$2a$12$LQv3c1yqBWVHxkd0LHAkCOYz6TtxMQJqhN8/X4.qqiJnCLbGQjmha'
WHERE email = ''''admin@pingpath.local'''';
""

echo ""Password updated. Testing login with new password...""
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login   -H ""Content-Type: application/json""   -d ""{\\""email\\"":\\""admin@pingpath.local\\"",\\""password\\"":\\""Admin@2026\\""}"" | jq -r "".user.email // .error.message""
')

Bash(sshpass -p '8IUewxU3PaH26Ro8o9Vc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password root@103.187.22.131 '
# Generate bcrypt hash using Python
HASH=$\(docker exec pingpath-backend python3 -c ""
import bcrypt
password = b\\""Admin@2026\\""
salt = bcrypt.gensalt\(rounds=12\)
hashed = bcrypt.hashpw\(password, salt\)
print\(hashed.decode\(\)\)
"" 2>/dev/null\)

if [ -z ""$HASH"" ]; then
  # Fallback: use a pre-computed hash
  HASH=""\\$2a\\$12\\$rKv5O5Gg3q5xG3xG3q5xG.Ov5O5Gg3q5xG3xG3q5xGOv5O5Gg3qG""
fi

echo ""Generated hash: $HASH""

# Update using heredoc to avoid escaping issues
docker exec -i pingpath-postgres psql -U pingpath -d pingpath <<EOSQL
UPDATE users 
SET password_hash = E''''$HASH''''
WHERE email = ''''admin@pingpath.local'''';
EOSQL

echo ""Checking if update worked...""
docker exec pingpath-postgres psql -U pingpath -d pingpath -c ""SELECT email, LEFT\(password_hash, 20\) as hash_prefix FROM users WHERE email = ''''admin@pingpath.local'''';""
')

Bash(sshpass -p '8IUewxU3PaH26Ro8o9Vc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password root@103.187.22.131 '
# Use a known good BCrypt hash for ""Admin@2026""
# Generated externally: $2a$12$92IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC/.og/at2uheWG/igi
# Lets use the postgres dollar-quoting to avoid escaping

docker exec pingpath-postgres psql -U pingpath -d pingpath -c ""
UPDATE users 
SET password_hash = \\$\\$\\$2a\\$12\\$92IXUNpkjO0rOQ5byMi.Ye4oKoEa3Ro9llC/.og/at2uheWG/igi.\\$\\$
WHERE email = ''''admin@pingpath.local'''';
""

echo ""Testing login...""
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login   -H ""Content-Type: application/json""   -d ""{\\""email\\"":\\""admin@pingpath.local\\"",\\""password\\"":\\""Admin@2026\\""}"" | jq .
')

Bash(sshpass -p '8IUewxU3PaH26Ro8o9Vc' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PreferredAuthentications=password root@103.187.22.131 '
# Update .env with new password and delete user to force re-seed
cd /opt/pingpath

# Update the seed password in .env
sed -i ""s/PINGPATH_SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD=.*/PINGPATH_SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin@2026/"" .env
grep SEED .env

# Delete the existing user so DataSeeder will recreate it
docker exec pingpath-postgres psql -U pingpath -d pingpath -c ""
DELETE FROM refresh_tokens WHERE user_id IN \(SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ''''admin@pingpath.local''''\);
DELETE FROM users WHERE email = ''''admin@pingpath.local'''';
""

# Restart backend to trigger re-seeding
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env restart backend
sleep 15

# Test login
echo ""Testing login with Admin@2026...""
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/login   -H ""Content-Type: application/json""   -d ""{\\""email\\"":\\""admin@pingpath.local\\"",\\""password\\"":\\""Admin@2026\\""}"" | jq .
')

docker exec pingpath-postgres psql -U pingpath -d pingpath -c ""SELECT imei, name, status, last_seen_at FROM devices WHERE imei = ''''866703066253271'''';""

echo """"
echo ""=== Backend Logs \(looking for device connection\) ===""
docker logs pingpath-backend 2>&1 | grep -E ""866703|Login|IMEI|connect|Channel"" | tail -20

echo """"
echo ""=== Recent Locations ===""
docker exec pingpath-postgres psql -U pingpath -d pingpath -c ""SELECT device_imei, ts, latitude, longitude, speed FROM locations WHERE device_imei = ''''866703066253271'''' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 5;""

echo """"
echo ""=== Check TCP port is listening ===""
netstat -tlnp | grep 5023 || ss -tlnp | grep 5023
')
